description: Orders placed without checking data.can_trade() — may attempt to trade halted or delisted assets.
explanation: Stocks can be halted for trading halts, circuit breakers, earnings announcements, or delisting. Placing orders on non-tradeable assets in a backtest silently succeeds but would fail in live trading. This creates a backtest/live divergence where the backtest shows impossible trades being executed.
suggested_fix: Always check data.can_trade(asset) before placing any order.

issues.title: Orders placed without checking if asset is tradeable
